key_numbers.label: Intern mileage expense allotment for leadership offices
Maximum postage allotment per calendar year for each senator
Maximum postage allotment per calendar year for each representative

evidence.quote: Each legislator shall have an Intern mileage expense allotment under the program of up to $600 each regular session for mileage expense reimbursement for Interns
The maximum amount of mileage expense reimbursement for any Kansas Legislative Intern shall not exceed $600 per session of the legislature
It shall be unlawful for any person to use for such person's personal use, or to allow any unauthorized person to use, any form of postage paid for with state funds.
